Amygdalan Tendril  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 DEX: +4
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Kryptonian Wildfire
Lucy Entry By:unknown
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:21:03
Page Updated:Wed May 3rd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Fear
NPC Name
Amygdalan knight
Amygdalan warrior

Plane of Fear 2.0
NPC Name
Amygdalan knight - PoF 2.0
Amygdalan warrior - PoF 2.0

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Dreadlands
Quest Name
Bard Epic: Singing Short Sword

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Fear
Plane of Fear 2.0


Uploaded April 10th, 2020 by iventheassassin

« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Even still horrifically low drop rate
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2024 at 11:31 PM Rating: Good
Master Aeldwan
View User Forum
Sage
109 posts
2024 now and I have yet to get it after killing all Amygdalans in zone 4 times now. Their faces have more than one, and there's about a dozen. Seriously, it's been 15+ years since the update how difficult would it be to raise the drop rate to at least once per clear for a non-boss item? Other people farm the zone for loot making it even more difficult to get.
____________________________
Master Aeldwan the Coercer and Decimator Buddercup Voxslayer of MT/Emarr
Glance the Stabber, Raiding Rogue of The Last Revolution
Kaarse the Ash Warden, Striker of the Black Desert
Keonka the Mangler of Drenden and Kager Ironveins Paladin of Arathor
Skuffal Skugbref of Chaos Wastes
Raene, Defiant of Harrow
Argus Grimm Elite Sniper of Auraxis and the 2RAF
"Doing the improbable daily to make the impossible seem easy"
▲ Page top
Ridiculous
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2020 at 8:08 PM Rating: Decent
lemonjello23
7 posts
This thing does not drop, I've killed nearly 30 of these and have to keep going back to PoFear. Best concentration of the Amygdalans is in the temple, but good luck getting it to drop.

update: finally got the tendril after killing about half a dozen more or so, was the only one I've seen. Dropped off an Amygdalan knight.

Edited, Apr 30th 2020 2:16am by lemonjello23

MQ
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2007 at 11:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591907350911
7 posts
I tried to MQ and failed, here is what I did

I did task with aluring horn and took it to BB and got letter for fopar
took Fopar his letter, with bard
ALT Turned in the backbone/tenical
Bard turned in the wolf head

Nothing, not even a message, both toons where ally. anyone able to tell me what i did wronge?
▲ Page top
MQ
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2013 at 11:50 AM Rating: Decent
markkuss
Sage
57 posts
I know this is an old post, but for future readers: you need to turn the note from Vedico to Forpar and get his note to himself, then turn in the note and the other pieces.

Edited, Oct 9th 2013 1:51pm by markkuss

Still MQable?
QuoteReply
# May 11 2006 at 4:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363705523
4 posts
I went up to Fear to get a tendril for my bard for his epic.I just spend the last few hours clearing fear, I am a 70 necro and cleared every amy warrior and knight in the zone along with everything else (mostly). Didn't have 1 tendril drop. A guildie of mine has a tendril in the bank but when we tried to MQ it, it just gave the item back to him. Is this still MQable?

Anyone had this drop recently been killin in here for a week now cleared all teh amys in zone more times then i wanted to and no drop seen sk item alot

Fear 4 times
QuoteReply
# May 16 2005 at 4:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257102401
Scholar
58 posts
I had been to Fear 4 times on Terris Thule, killed Amy warriors every time and had never seen one drop - hit the social I had set up to shout my desire to pay for an MQ, and (amazingly) got a response.

They are 5k richer, and I have a lute neck (and a lute body) so all that is left is Trak.
▲ Page top
my story
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2004 at 5:13 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362337626
160 posts
after 5 days of trying... (i would solo it but im only 55 and need FM to solo) i finally got a group together... we went in (golems and CT were down) just stood there to get agro from stuff and just cleared half the zone... we had
65SK
65Cle
65Dru
55ENc
55Bard(me)
65Rogue

after that and killing 2 roaming amy's we went to north west corner of zone and pulled to there from inside the ring (3-6) at a time.. i helped mezzing and sang haste and heal/mana... since they dispell there like crazy bard is like the only way to get haste and mana regen going cuz we resing it every tick...

after killing about 7Warriors and 5 or so knights the tendril dropped,. think there were like 2 more left in zone (amy warriors)... I looted and we got out through the temple (druid left by thta point so didnt have a porter)

so we pretty much cleared the whole temple before it droppd had like 5 mobs left in temple

chanter got his epic piece too heh from the wraith thing...

amy's also dropped 2 shields..

PS - this was my 1st attempt to get it. Before this Ive cleared Fear many times mostly for the Skelly Ammy... saw the tendril drop every other clearing or so. but yeah I guess im lucky that when I went there to get it specifially I had it drop =D

Edited, Thu Sep 9 06:15:46 2004

#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 24 2004 at 11:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I guess back in the day this was only used as a weapon. I would think a Short Sword of Ykesha would be at least compareable with this though. Considering it was a High End Raid zone for the time, seems pretty weak. Then again about all POF/POH drops look pretty weak now.
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 15 2003 at 12:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) K i know this is old world, but thats part of the point. SSOY's were even better than this ESPECIALLY for a warrior. For the difficulty to obtain this? Nah shoulda been alot better. maybe 9/21 or so.
